name: piano_online
description: Interactive bilingual virtual piano and song-learning website.

scripts.generate:content: npm run generate:songs && npm run generate:tutorials && npm run generate:sitemaps
scripts.test: npm run generate:content && node --check js/main.js && node --check js/guided-homepage.js && node --check js/guided-entry-bindings.js && node --check js/song-discovery.js && node --check js/song-page.js && node --check js/score-viewer.js && node --check js/concert-hall-ui.js && node --check js/piano-audio.js && node --check js/audio-runtime.mjs && node --check data/song-scores.mjs && node --check data/song-library.mjs && node --check data/tutorial-library.mjs && node --check scripts/render-song-pages.mjs && node --check scripts/render-tutorial-pages.mjs && node --check scripts/render-sitemaps.mjs && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && npm run test:audio && npm run test:home && npm run test:secondary && npm run test:songs && npm run test:tutorials && npm run test:score
